Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. The wild six weeks for NanoClaw's creator that led to a deal with Docker 59 upvotes, 7 comments
  2. Okmain: How to pick an OK main colour of an image 225 upvotes, 42 comments
  3. The Accidental Room (2018) 21 upvotes, 1 comments
  4. Can I run AI locally? 764 upvotes, 214 comments
  5. Using Thunderbird for RSS 45 upvotes, 7 comments
  6. The Wyden Siren Goes Off Again: We'll Be "Stunned" by NSA Under Section 702 316 upvotes, 101 comments
  7. Lost Doctor Who Episodes Found 183 upvotes, 56 comments
  8. Show HN: Channel Surfer – Watch YouTube like it’s cable TV 361 upvotes, 129 comments
  9. Meta Platforms: Lobbying, dark money, and the App Store Accountability Act 1125 upvotes, 471 comments
  10. Executing programs inside transformers with exponentially faster inference 285 upvotes, 112 comments
  11. Hammerspoon 161 upvotes, 63 comments
  12. Mouser: An open source alternative to Logi-Plus mouse software 115 upvotes, 45 comments
  13. TUI Studio – visual terminal UI design tool 522 upvotes, 269 comments
  14. Exploring JEPA for real-time speech translation 13 upvotes, 2 comments
  15. E2E encrypted messaging on Instagram will no longer be supported after 8 May 344 upvotes, 177 comments
  16. Bucketsquatting is finally dead 294 upvotes, 153 comments
  17. I Found 39 Algolia Admin Keys Exposed Across Open Source Documentation Sites 8 upvotes, 1 comments
  18. Launch HN: Captain (YC W26) – Automated RAG for Files 41 upvotes, 19 comments
  19. New 'negative light' technology hides data transfers in plain sight 39 upvotes, 18 comments
  20. Hyperlinks in terminal emulators 80 upvotes, 55 comments
  21. Show HN: Context Gateway – Compress agent context before it hits the LLM 52 upvotes, 33 comments
  22. Stanford researchers report first recording of a blue whale's heart rate (2019) 33 upvotes, 20 comments
  23. Qatar helium shutdown puts chip supply chain on a two-week clock 331 upvotes, 317 comments
  24. Launch HN: Spine Swarm (YC S23) – AI agents that collaborate on a visual canvas 77 upvotes, 63 comments
  25. Source code of Swedish e-government services has been leaked 187 upvotes, 180 comments
  26. Your phone is an entire computer 198 upvotes, 200 comments
  27. Elon Musk pushes out more xAI founders as AI coding effort falters 226 upvotes, 287 comments
  28. Parallels confirms MacBook Neo can run Windows in a virtual machine 149 upvotes, 191 comments
  29. John Carmack about open source and anti-AI activists 192 upvotes, 272 comments
  30. Militaries are scrambling to create their own Starlink 79 upvotes, 112 comments

Last generated 7:00am, 14 March 2026. Source here.
